_comment: Normalized dump of the Atlantic Canada Dealer BD list (chunk 0086). Faithful copy of every Dealer Tracker row (raw fields, trimmed). The import (scripts/import-atlantic-dealers.ts) applies `dropList` (skip-flagged), name+city dedup (skip-existing-dealer, incl. the 2nd Motor Hub Antigonish row), and email-based contact dedup. Pure BD-workflow columns (Priority/Pipeline Stage/Owner/Last Contact/Next Action[/Date]) are intentionally not exported. See decision.md.
